errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission for this action.
errors.server: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.timeout: The request took too long. Check your connection.

auth.mfaDesc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
auth.mfaRequired: Two-factor authentication required. Enter the code from your app.
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.mfaInvalid: Invalid code or session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.loginFailed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetEmailSent: We sent a password reset link to {email}. It may take a minute to arrive.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

kanban.title: Kanban boards
kanban.subtitle: Workflows for your team. New boards include To Do, In Progress, Done, and History.
kanban.defaultColumnsHint: This board will open with four columns: To Do, In Progress, Done, and History. You can rename them or add more anytime.
kanban.deleteBoardConfirm: Delete this board and all its columns and cards?
kanban.deleteColumnConfirm: Delete column "{name}" and all cards in it? This cannot be undone.
kanban.deleteCardConfirm: Delete card "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
kanban.emptyBoard: No columns yet. Add a column to get started.
kanban.noBoards: No boards yet. Create one to start tracking work.
kanban.workHubSubtitle: Filter cards by assignee and column type (To Do, In Progress, Done, History) across all boards.
kanban.workHubTroubleshoot: Ensure the API is running (e.g. port 8080) and you are logged in. The work hub calls GET /api/v1/kanban/work-items. If boards have no cards yet, the table will be empty (not an error).

rolesPage.title: Roles & permissions
rolesPage.subtitle: Assign permission codes to each role. Users inherit permissions from their roles.
rolesPage.matrixHint: Checked permissions apply to every user with this role.
rolesPage.readOnlyHint: You can view roles but need user:write to change permissions.
rolesPage.inviteTooltip: Open Users and pre-select this role for a new account

clientsPage.title: Clients
clientsPage.loadError: Could not load clients. Check your connection or permissions.
clientsPage.name: Name

campaignsPage.backendNote: Campaigns API is not part of this backend repository yet. This page will return errors until /api/v1/campaigns is implemented.

posSupport.subtitle: Support tickets received from point-of-sale systems
